rule: No new external send without explicit authorization and a specific recipient.

alreadyContacted.name: METI International / Douglas Vakoch
alreadyContacted.status: review request and coordinate addendum already sent
alreadyContacted.futureUse: wait for response; short follow-up only after reasonable interval

alreadyContacted.name: SETI Institute
alreadyContacted.futureUse: wait for response; avoid duplicate messages

priorityCandidates.name: METI International
priorityCandidates.recommendedAction: follow up only if no response after a reasonable interval

priorityCandidates.name: SETI Institute
priorityCandidates.recommendedAction: use general routing already contacted; no mass sending

priorityCandidates.name: NASA/IPAC Exoplanet Archive Helpdesk
priorityCandidates.recommendedAction: ask only for technical verification of Epsilon Eridani parameters

priorityCandidates.name: Astrobiology / exoplanet research groups
priorityCandidates.recommendedAction: select from official university/institute pages before any contact

priorityCandidates.name: Public scientific archive
priorityCandidates.recommendedAction: archive only as model/speculative project, not as discovery claim

doNotUse: claims that Galia-Lumen is a confirmed planet
